title: Tank Farm H2S Exposure Incident Pattern
content: H2S exposure incident at a chemical tank farm during confined space entry operations. H2S sensor TS-01 in Zone C showed progressive drift from 2 ppm to 18 ppm over 35 minutes. Confined space entry permit CS-2203 was active during this period. Ventilation system V-12 was under scheduled maintenance (status: offline). The entry team was not notified of the gas drift because monitoring and permit systems were not integrated. Two workers experienced H2S exposure symptoms before evacuation. Pattern: H2S drift + confined space entry + inadequate ventilation = critical exposure risk. This combination is documented in 4 major H2S exposure incidents across Indian chemical facilities.
